title: DDL, Constraints, Schema Evolution, and Integrity Repair · Relational Lens: Create Table Domains
summary: The support schema must reject impossible states and evolve while old application versions are still active. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sql create table domains increment in a constraint-rich, reversible schema migration. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define tables with deliberate types, defaults, generated values, and named constraints.
Defend decomposition with lossless-join and dependency-preservation evidence and justify bounded denormalization.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.
